item.title: Sorry, it's not!
item.description: My corvette is not a base model...it's a widebody

item.title: It's their problem
item.description: My loud cars bother my neighbors...but it's not my problem

item.title: He's just like me
item.description: Meme about car content featuring Donald Trump

item.title: FILTHY Lifted Diesels Get a Full Detailing
item.description: Two filthy lifted diesel trucks finally get the deep clean they desperately needed. After plenty of dirt, grime, and daily use, it’s time for a full detail to bring them back to life and see just how good they can look again.

media:content.media:title: FILTHY Lifted Diesels Get a Full Detailing
media:content.media:description: Two filthy lifted diesel trucks finally get the deep clean they desperately needed. After plenty of dirt, grime, and daily use, it’s time for a full detail to bring them back to life and see just how good they can look again.

item.title: Cars are more than just metal and wheels
item.description: This talks about the sentimental values of our cars

item.title: Which car would you choose?
item.description: If you could have one of these cars: corvette or split window, which one would you choose?
